rules.rule_text:
rule Hancidoc : Dropper
{
	meta:
		author = "moutonplacide"
		date = "2016-11-23"
		description = "Hancitor document dropper"

	strings:
		$doc = {d0 cf 11 e0 a1 b1 1a e1 00 00}
		$author = "Kimberly"
		$pe_marker = /[A-Z]{8}\x08\x00/

	condition:
		($doc at 0 ) and ( $author and $pe_marker )
}
